name: python3-manuf
title: python3-manuf
summary: Parser library for Wireshark's OUI database (Python 3)
description:
Parser library for Wireshark's OUI database (Python 3)
This package contains a parser library for Wireshark's OUI database. It
converts MAC addresses into a manufacturer using Wireshark's OUI database.
.
It's optimized for quick lookup performance by reading the entire file into
memory on initialization. Maps ranges of MAC addresses to manufacturers and
comments (descriptions). It contains full support for netmasks and other
strange things in the database.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use manuf because Parser library for Wireshark's OUI database (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use manuf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `manuf [options] [args]` as documented upstream for manuf.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair manuf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `manuf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
